checks.name: Project & Usage Alignment
checks.notes:
PyTorch3D provides efficient, reusable components for 3D deep learning. Used in cryo-EM for 3D visualization, volumetric operations, rendering, and geometric transformations of reconstructed molecular structures.

Aligns with the approved research topic Datascience and engineering.
